meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scale Freelance Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Master AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality freelance projects at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: To scale freelance projects, stop manual debugging. Integrate Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for CLI-based remediation. By automating the identification of technical debt and deploying AI agents to refactor brittle code, you reduce cycle times by 70%, allowing you to take on more clients without sacrificing quality.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client is asking for a feature update, and your codebase has become a fragile house of cards. You are trapped in the 'manual debugging loop,' where fixing one bug inevitably spawns two more, effectively killing your ability to scale. This isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of leverage.

True velocity comes from offloading the cognitive load of architectural debt to machine-learning models that never sleep. By treating your codebase as a data stream for AI analysis, you move from being a pixel-pusher to an elite system architect. It is time to stop fighting your editor and start orchestrating your output.

steps.title: Architectural Health Audit
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, identify the structural bottlenecks preventing your code from scaling. Use Antigravity to map dependency graphs and high-churn areas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for high-cyclomatic complexity files and circular dependencies. Provide a report of the top 3 modules that will cause scaling issues as the user base grows.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --read-only 'analyze architecture and identify circular dependencies'

steps.title: Automated Bug Isolation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the execution path of failing tests. This removes the need for manual console logging and speeds up root cause identification.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a diagnostic test suite for the identified high-churn modules to isolate state-related bugs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'find the root cause of the intermittent auth failure in user-service'

steps.title: Refactoring for Modularity
steps.description: Convert monolithic functions into modular, testable units. This ensures your project remains maintainable as requirements evolve.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified monolithic function into clean, single-responsibility modules following SOLID principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor the checkout service into modular components'

steps.title: Automated Regression Shielding
steps.description: Implement an AI-generated safety net of unit tests for every fix, ensuring that your scaling efforts don't break existing features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest test suite covering edge cases for the newly refactored modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write unit tests for the updated checkout service and ensure 90% coverage'

steps.title: CI/CD Integration
steps.description: Automate the debugging process by plugging your AI agent into the PR workflow, ensuring every commit is validated before merging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers an automated AI code review on every pull request.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a ci-cd config that validates code quality and runs tests on push'

pro_tips: Always force the AI to provide a 'Complexity Score' for every refactored module to ensure you are actually simplifying, not just changing syntax.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep a running 'Style Guide' of your preferred architectural patterns so AI output remains consistent.
When debugging, feed the AI the stack trace AND the last 5 relevant git commits to give it temporal context for the bug introduction.
Treat your AI agent like a junior developer; review the logic, but let it handle the boilerplate and unit test generation.
Set up a 'Shadow Environment' where AI agents perform automated regression testing against production snapshots to catch bugs before they go live.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your most complex legacy project using the architectural health audit step. Once you have identified the primary bottleneck, apply the refactoring steps to that single module before rolling out the process to the entire codebase.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance career. By mastering AI-assisted debugging, you reclaim your time and double your output capacity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Use Claude Code to trace the execution path of failing tests. This removes the need for manual console logging and speeds up root cause identification.
Convert monolithic functions into modular, testable units. This ensures your project remains maintainable as requirements evolve.
Implement an AI-generated safety net of unit tests for every fix, ensuring that your scaling efforts don't break existing features.
Automate the debugging process by plugging your AI agent into the PR workflow, ensuring every commit is validated before merging.
